---
title: "Simulation study"
author: "Maciej Beręsewicz"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

Q: are there any other patters where IPW is better than MI?

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)

results <- readRDS("../results/sim-results.rds")
setDT(results)

true_values <- data.table(
  target = c("y11", "y12", "y21", "y22"),
  true_mean = c(2.992724, 2.57075, 0.89095, 0.7515)
)

results <- merge(results, true_values, by = "target")
results <- results[!is.nan(SE)]
#results[, .N, .(lower_bound < 0)] ## for some estimators we had large SEs (mainly dr)
results[, basis:=factor(basis,
                        c("main", "quartiles", "deciles", "main+quartiles", "main+deciles"),
                        c("totals", "quartiles", "deciles", "totals\n+quartiles", "totals\n+deciles"))]
results[, estimator := factor(estimator, c("ipw", "mi", "dr"))]
results[, bias := mean - true_mean]
results[, covered := as.numeric(lower_bound <= true_mean & true_mean <= upper_bound)]

## summary statistics
summary_dt <- results[, .(
  mean_bias = mean(bias),
  rmse = sqrt(mean(bias^2 + SE^2)),
  coverage = mean(covered)
), by = .(target, estimator, dataset, basis)]

results_cont <- results[target %in% c("y11", "y12")]
results_bin  <- results[target %in% c("y21", "y22")]
summary_cont <- summary_dt[target %in% c("y11", "y12")]
summary_bin  <- summary_dt[target %in% c("y21", "y22")]

## shared theme and palette
theme_sim <- theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        text = element_text(size = 15))
palette_sim <- scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2")

## figures directory
dir.create("../results/figures", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```

## Bias

### Continuous outcomes (y11, y12)

```{r bias-cont, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
results_cont |> 
  subset(dataset == "bd2" & target %in% c("y11", "y12")) |> 
  transform(dataset = "BD2 (non-linear selection)",
            target = factor(target,
                            c("y11", "y12"),
                            c("y11 (linear)", "y12 (non-linear)"))) |>
  ggplot(data = _, aes(x = basis, y = bias, fill = estimator)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_grid(dataset ~ target, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_sim + 
  palette_sim +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "Bias", fill = "Estimator") -> p

p
ggsave("../results/figures/bias-cont.png", p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r se-cont, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
results_cont |> 
  subset(dataset == "bd2" & target %in% c("y11", "y12")) |> 
  transform(dataset = "BD2 (non-linear selection)",
            target = factor(target,
                            c("y11", "y12"),
                            c("y11 (linear)", "y12 (non-linear)"))) |>
  ggplot(data = _, aes(x = basis, y = SE, fill = estimator)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_grid(dataset ~ target, scales = "free_y") +
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 2)) + 
  #scale_y_log10() +
  theme_sim + 
  palette_sim +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "SE", fill = "Estimator") -> p

p
ggsave("../results/figures/se-cont.png", p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

### Binary outcomes (y21, y22)

```{r bias-bin, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
results_bin |> 
  subset(dataset == "bd2" & target %in% c("y21", "y22")) |>
  transform(dataset = "BD2 (non-linear selection)",
            target = factor(target,
                            c("y21", "y22"),
                            c("y21 (linear)", "y22 (non-linear)"))) |>
  ggplot(data=_, aes(x = basis, y = bias, fill = estimator)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_grid(dataset ~ target, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_sim + 
  palette_sim +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "Bias", fill = "Estimator") -> p

p
ggsave("../results/figures/bias-bin.png", p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r se-bin, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
results_bin |> 
  subset(dataset == "bd2" & target %in% c("y21", "y22")) |>
  transform(dataset = "BD2 (non-linear selection)",
            target = factor(target,
                            c("y21", "y22"),
                            c("y21 (linear)", "y22 (non-linear)"))) |>
  ggplot(data = _, aes(x = basis, y = SE, fill = estimator)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_grid(dataset ~ target, scales = "free_y") +
  #scale_y_log10() +
  theme_sim + 
  palette_sim +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "SE", fill = "Estimator") -> p

p
ggsave("../results/figures/se-bin.png", p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

## RMSE

### Continuous outcomes (y11, y12)

```{r rmse-cont, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
p <- ggplot(summary_cont, aes(x = basis, y = rmse, fill = estimator)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge()) +
  facet_grid(dataset ~ target, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_sim + palette_sim +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "RMSE", fill = "Estimator")
p
ggsave("../results/figures/rmse-cont.png", p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

### Binary outcomes (y21, y22)

```{r rmse-bin, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
p <- ggplot(summary_bin, aes(x = basis, y = rmse, fill = estimator)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge()) +
  facet_grid(dataset ~ target, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_sim + palette_sim +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "RMSE", fill = "Estimator")
p
ggsave("../results/figures/rmse-bin.png", p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

## CI Coverage

### Continuous outcomes (y11, y12)

```{r coverage-cont, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
summary_cont |> 
  subset(dataset == "bd2" & target %in% c("y11", "y12")) |> 
  transform(dataset = "BD2 (non-linear selection)",
            target = factor(target,
                            c("y11", "y12"),
                            c("y11 (linear)", "y12 (non-linear)"))) |>
  ggplot(data = _, aes(x = basis, y = coverage, fill = estimator)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge()) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.95, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_grid(dataset ~ target) +
  theme_sim + palette_sim +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "Coverage", fill = "Estimator") -> p
p
ggsave("../results/figures/coverage-cont.png", p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

### Binary outcomes (y21, y22)

```{r coverage-bin, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
summary_bin |> 
  subset(dataset == "bd2" & target %in% c("y21", "y22")) |> 
  transform(dataset = "BD2 (non-linear selection)",
            target = factor(target,
                            c("y21", "y22"),
                            c("y21 (linear)", "y22 (non-linear)"))) |>
  ggplot(data = _, aes(x = basis, y = coverage, fill = estimator)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge()) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.95, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_grid(dataset ~ target) +
  theme_sim + palette_sim +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "Coverage", fill = "Estimator") -> p
p
ggsave("../results/figures/coverage-bin.png", p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
